name: Card
summary: Quiet containers defined by border and spacing, not by decoration.
structurePatterns: Shadow appears only on elevated or floating moments
Large media uses generous inset and aspect-ratio framing

structures.name: Standard Information Card
structures.description: Text-forward module with calm neutral surface and precise rhythm.
notes: Prefer spacing contrast over divider lines

structures.name: Media Card
structures.description: Product or lifestyle card with image-led composition and understated copy.
notes: No layered gradients inside the card itself
